bb + dd + coco. An even rarer pale champagne-lilac shade.

Breed100
Flip100

High rarity + strong demand = fastest resale margin.
Ultra-rare genetic profile — blue-chip asset in Frenchie market.
Higher health risk requires careful vetting of breeder lines.
